texto: Maybe the reason nothing seems to be 'fixing you' is because you're not broken. Let today be the day you stop living within the confines of how others define or judge you. You have a unique beauty and purpose
explicacao: Citação de live accordingly. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Maybe the reason nothing seems to be 'fixing you' is because you're not broken. Let today be the …” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, maybe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
